Try together: count his fingers to 3 today
Try together: count the stairs on the way down
Try together: line up 3 crackers, eat them one… two… three!
Try together: find 2 shoes by the door
Try together: count 3 jumps before breakfast
Try together: put 3 blocks in a tower, counting each one
Try together: count everyone's cups at the table
Try together: spot 2 trees out the window
Try together: count 3 claps — then do it again louder!
Try together: count the buttons on his shirt
Try together: drop 3 toys in the bin, one… two… three!
Try together: count 2 ears, 2 eyes, 1 nose
